calendar.matters:
Motion For Relief From Default
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON BOTH PARTIES: MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAUL IS GRANTED.

Notice Of Motion For Stay On Enforcement Of Judgment Pending Appeal
Off Calendar Oct-07-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
William M. Simpich, Esq., 510/444-0226, for defendants Thomas Allegretti and Pamela Allegretti, moving for stay on enforcement of judgment pending appeal
Steven C. Williams, Esq. of WIEGEL & FRIED 552-8230, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
No argument was made. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as amended -- Motion for stay on enforcement of judgment pending appeal -- Stay Granted up until 11/4/03 per stipulation of counsel, at which point it will expire unless it is extened by the Court of Appeals on the condition that all rent up to and including 10/31 be paid to plaintiff's lawyers. Each side submitted an order for the Court's consideration. The order signed in chambers. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-16-2003 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-22-2003 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
Off Calendar Sep-19-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Steven C. Williams, Esq. and John P. Baba, Esq. of WIEGEL & FRIED 552-8230, for plaintiff Gamaliel Escobar, moving for summary judgment
William M. Simpich, Esq., 510/444-0226, for defendant and opposing party

RULING:
* Court received the courtesy copies of opposition and reply prior to the hearing. Tentative ruling was vacated.
** A R G U E D and the Court took PLAINTIFF GAMALIEL ESCOBAR'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT under submission. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-18-2003 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
William M. Simpich, Esq., 510/444-0226, for defendants THOMAS ALLEGRETTI and PAMELA ALLEGRETTI, demurring to complaint
Steven C. Williams, Esq. of WIEGEL & FRIED 552-8230, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANTS THOMAS
ALLEGRETTI and PAMELA ALLEGRETTI'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Overruled, 5 days leave
to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JLW/301/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton CSR #1558
